task_completion.description: Open the employee record for Maria Gonzalez
task_completion.visual_evidence: The AttendHRM application is open and the employee profile or record for 'Maria Gonzalez' is actively displayed.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Visa details into the system
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Visa details form is filled with Visa Number 'V987654321', Country 'United States', Issue Date '15-Jan-2025', Expiry Date '14-Jan-2028', and Type/Note 'Work Permit'.

task_completion.description: Upload the specified visa scan document
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file selection dialog or attachment list showing the file 'maria_visa_scan.jpg' from the 'C:\workspace\data\' directory being selected or uploaded.

task_completion.description: Set the title of the uploaded document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document title or description field associated with the uploaded file is filled with the text 'Renewed Work Visa'.

task_completion.description: Save the updated employee visa record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save' or 'OK' button to commit the visa details, or a success/confirmation screen is visible indicating the record was updated.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the AttendHRM graphical user interface to update the record
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with the AttendHRM desktop application windows, not a terminal, command prompt, or database tool (like isql.exe) executing SQL commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually interacted with the file system to upload the document
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a genuine Windows file explorer dialog to select 'maria_visa_scan.jpg', rather than just typing a path into a text field that doesn't actually attach a file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just type the required details into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be entered into the actual AttendHRM application fields, not Notepad or another text editor.
